commands.import: npx pathloom import --format logfile --input ./fixtures/demo-pack/authoritative-ready/events.ndjson --catalog ./fixtures/demo-pack/authoritative-ready/tool-catalog.json --source logfile:demo-pack --actor-privacy hashed

description: Canonical importable Pathloom demo pack with enough realistic sessions, client divergence, argument mismatches, sequence behavior, and actor linkage to exercise the full credibility-first report surface.

expectedFindings.summary: query correlated with 83% second-session return in the linked cohort at 14.17x the return rate of the rest of the cohort.
expectedFindings.title: Activation tool report

expectedFindings.summary: 2 targeted failure paths and 2 reusable success paths crossed the emission threshold.
expectedFindings.title: Sequence risk map (4)

expectedFindings.summary: 2 registered tools had zero calls across 29 sessions.
expectedFindings.title: Dead tools (2)

expectedFindings.summary: 2 client-level divergence patterns crossed the emission threshold.
expectedFindings.title: Client divergence (2)

expectedFindings.summary: 2 recurring argument mismatch patterns crossed the emission threshold.
expectedFindings.title: Argument mismatch patterns (2)

expectedFindings.summary: list was the most common termination tool, and 2 candidate dead-end patterns crossed the emission threshold.
expectedFindings.title: Session termination analysis (2)

title: Authoritative Ready Demo Pack
